dev_focus: C2628 DIRECTIVE — MOBILE TOUCH TARGET SWEEP (Phase 2). Trace C2626 fixed PDP sticky ATC, size/color buttons, announcement bar. GOOD. Remaining verified issues: (1) src/components/shop/product-filters.tsx — MANY filter buttons below 44px: category pills (line 126,139: py-1.5), size buttons (line 225: py-1, min-w-[2.5rem]), color swatches (line 262: py-1), condition chips (line 305: py-1). These are in the DRAWER on mobile — touch targets critical. Fix: all interactive filter elements min-h-11 (44px). Active filter chips at bottom (line 452,481: py-1) also need min-h-9. (2) src/app/(shop)/cart/page.tsx line 231-238 — Trash/remove button is bare <button> with only size-4 icon (16px). Must be at least 44×44px touch target. Add min-h-11 min-w-11 flex items-center justify-center. (3) Checkout step indicator circles (src/app/(shop)/checkout/page.tsx) — currently size-8 (32px), should be size-9 (36px) on mobile. SCOPE: Only these 3 files. Do NOT touch anything else. Run `npm run build` — must pass.
qa_focus: TRACE: After Bolt commits touch target fixes: (1) Open filter drawer at 375px — ALL buttons/chips must be ≥44px touch height, (2) Cart page: trash button tap area ≥44×44px, (3) Checkout: step indicators visually correct after size bump, (4) No horizontal overflow on any page at 375px, (5) Build passes clean.
notes: C2628 Lead — Mobile polish Phase 2. Trace C2626 fixed 3 real bugs (Phase 1 success). Now Bolt tackles remaining touch targets in filter drawer, cart, checkout. Scoped to 3 files only. Trace paused until Bolt commits — no point verifying before fixes land.

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
